<!-- Splash Screen -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <div class="splash-logo"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></div>
  <div class="splash-name">MAURICE<span>.TCG</span></div>
  <div class="splash-sub">Collection Tracker</div>
  <div class="splash-bar"><div class="splash-bar-fill"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- App Header -->
<header class="app-header">
  <div class="app-logo" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:none;outline:none;box-shadow:none">MAURICE<span>.TCG</span></div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept=".xlsx,.xls" style="display:none">
    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()" title="Excel Import">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ═══ DASHBOARD VIEW ═══ -->
<div class="view active" id="viewDashboard">
  <div class="main-content">
    <div style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <h2 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.3px">Meine Sammlung</h2>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px" id="dashDate"></p>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-scroll" id="dashKpis"></div>
    <div class="dash-grid">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">Wertverteilung <span class="tag">Kategorien</span></div>
        <div class="donut-wrap"><canvas id="chartDonut" height="240"></canvas>
          <div class="donut-center"><div class="v" id="donutVal"></div><div class="l">Gesamtwert</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">Kategorien</div>
        <div id="dashCats"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">Top 5 wertvollste <span class="tag">Highlights</span></div>
        <div id="dashTop5"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">Sprachen <span class="tag">Verteilung</span></div>
        <canvas id="chartLang" height="160"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ COLLECTION VIEW ═══ -->
<div class="view" id="viewCollection">
  <div class="main-content">
    <div style="margin-bottom:14px">
      <h2 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800">Sammlung</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="search-box">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
      <input type="text" id="collSearch" placeholder="Karte suchen...">
    </div>
    <div class="chips" id="collChips"></div>
    <div class="coll-grid" id="collCards"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ ADD VIEW ═══ -->
<div class="view" id="viewAdd">
  <div class="main-content" style="max-width:600px">
  <div style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <h2 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800">Karte hinzufügen</h2>
  </div>
  <!-- Step 1: Search -->
  <div id="addStep1">
    <div class="search-box">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
      <input type="text" id="apiSearch" placeholder="Kartenname oder Set-Nummer...">
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">Suche über TCGdex API (z.B. "Nachtara", "sv2a-201")</p>
    <div id="apiResults"></div>
  </div>
  <!-- Step 2: Details -->
  <div id="addStep2" style="display:none">
    <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="showAddStep(1)" style="margin-bottom:14px;width:auto">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
      Zurück zur Suche
    </button>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px">
      <div id="addPreview" style="width:100px;height:140px;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg)"></div>
      <h3 id="addCardName" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-top:10px"></h3>
      <p id="addCardSet" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)"></p>
      <p id="addCardPrice" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);margin-top:4px"></p>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Kategorie</label>
      <select class="form-select" id="addCategory">
        <option value="Binder">Binder</option>
        <option value="Eevee Binder">Eevee Binder</option>
        <option value="Random Binder">Random Binder</option>
        <option value="Slabs">Slabs</option>
        <option value="Sealed">Sealed</option>
        <option value="Sealed Promos">Sealed Promos</option>
        <option value="151 Master">151 Master JP</option>
        <option value="Terastal Master">Terastal Master</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Sprache</label>
      <select class="form-select" id="addLang">
        <option value="JP">Japanisch (JP)</option>
        <option value="DE">Deutsch (DE)</option>
        <option value="EN">Englisch (EN)</option>
        <option value="FR">Französisch (FR)</option>
        <option value="CN">Chinesisch (CN)</option>
        <option value="CH">Chinesisch Trad. (CH)</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Zustand</label>
      <select class="form-select" id="addCondition">
        <option value="NM">Near Mint (NM)</option>
        <option value="EX">Excellent (EX)</option>
        <option value="GD">Good (GD)</option>
        <option value="LP">Light Played (LP)</option>
        <option value="PO">Poor (PO)</option>
        <option value="Sealed">Sealed</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group" id="gradeGroup" style="display:none">
      <label class="form-label">Grade</label>
      <select class="form-select" id="addGrade">
        <option value="">Kein Grade</option>
        <option value="PSA 10">PSA 10</option>
        <option value="PSA 9">PSA 9</option>
        <option value="PSA 8">PSA 8</option>
        <option value="PSA 7">PSA 7</option>
        <option value="CGC Pristine 10">CGC Pristine 10</option>
        <option value="CGC 9.5">CGC 9.5</option>
        <option value="CGC 9">CGC 9</option>
        <option value="ACE 10">ACE 10</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Preis (€) — manuell überschreiben</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="number" id="addPrice" step="0.01" placeholder="Automatisch von Cardmarket">
    </div>
    <div class="photo-section">
      <label class="form-label">Eigenes Foto (optional)</label>
      <div class="photo-options">
        <button class="photo-btn" onclick="capturePhoto()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4l2-3h6l2 3h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="4"/></svg>
          Kamera
        </button>
        <button class="photo-btn" onclick="pickPhoto()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"/></svg>
          Galerie
        </button>
        <button class="photo-btn" onclick="promptImageUrl()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"/><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"/></svg>
          Bild-URL
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-preview" id="addPhotoPreview">
        <img id="addPhotoImg" src="">
        <button class="remove-photo" onclick="removeAddPhoto()">✕</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <input type="file" id="cameraInput" accept="image/*" capture="environment" style="display:none">
    <input type="file" id="galleryInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none">
    <button class="btn" onclick="saveCard()">Zur Sammlung hinzufügen</button>
  </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SETTINGS VIEW ═══ -->
<div class="view" id="viewSettings">
  <div style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <h2 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800">Einstellungen</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">Excel importieren</div><div class="desc">Collection.xlsx einlesen</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="syncForPhone()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="5" y="2" width="14" height="20" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12.01" y2="18"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">📱 Für Handy speichern</div><div class="desc" id="syncStatus">Komplette App + Daten als eine HTML-Datei</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="exportCollection()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">Sammlung exportieren</div><div class="desc">Als JSON-Datei sichern</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="updateAllPrices()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 4v6h-6"/><path d="M1 20v-6h6"/><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">Preise aktualisieren</div><div class="desc" id="priceUpdateStatus">Cardmarket-Preise via TCGdex</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="matchAllImages()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">Bilder matchen</div><div class="desc" id="imageMatchStatus">TCGdex-Artworks für alle Karten laden</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="importJSON()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label">JSON importieren</div><div class="desc">Backup wiederherstellen</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="clearAllData()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="color:var(--red)"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label" style="color:var(--red)">Alle Daten löschen</div><div class="desc">Sammlung zurücksetzen</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div class="settings-item" onclick="showMissingImages()">
    <div class="left">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="color:var(--orange)"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="21"/><line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9"/></svg>
      <div><div class="label" style="color:var(--orange)">Fehlende Bilder</div><div class="desc" id="missingImgCount">Karten ohne Bild anzeigen</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">›</div>
  </div>
  <div id="missingImgList" style="display:none;margin-bottom:14px"></div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:24px;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">
    Maurice.tcg v1.1 — Persönliches Tool für Maurice.tcg<br>
    Preise: TCGdex / Cardmarket &bull; Kartendaten: TCGdex API
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ Detail Modal ═══ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="cardModal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-handle"></div>
    <div class="modal-photos" id="modalPhotos"></div>
    <h2 id="modalName"></h2>
    <p class="subtitle" id="modalSet"></p>
    <div class="detail-grid" id="modalGrid"></div>
    <div class="modal-photo-actions" id="modalPhotoActions">
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="modalCapturePhoto()">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4l2-3h6l2 3h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="4"/></svg>
        Foto hinzufügen
      </button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="modalPickPhoto()">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"/></svg>
        Galerie
      </button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="modalPromptImageUrl()">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"/><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"/></svg>
        Bild-URL
      </button>
    </div>
    <input type="file" id="modalCameraInput" accept="image/*" capture="environment" style="display:none">
    <input type="file" id="modalGalleryInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none">
    <div style="margin-bottom:16px"><canvas id="modalPriceChart" height="120"></canvas></div>
    <div class="detail-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal()">Schließen</button>
      <button class="btn btn-danger" id="modalDeleteBtn">Löschen</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ Bottom Navigation ═══ -->
<nav class="bottom-nav">
  <button class="nav-tab active" data-view="viewDashboard">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1"/></svg>
    Dashboard
  </button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-view="viewCollection">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="2" y1="9" x2="22" y2="9"/></svg>
    Sammlung
  </button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-view="viewAdd">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="16"/><line x1="8" y1="12" x2="16" y2="12"/></svg>
    Hinzufügen
  </button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-view="viewSettings">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.68 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 4.68a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 19.4 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"/></svg>
    Mehr
  </button>
</nav>

<input type="file" id="jsonInput" accept=".json" style="display:none">
